_comment: Pterodactyl Egg for Stockfish 18 REST API
name: Stockfish 18 REST API
author: galihrhgnwn
description: Stockfish 18 chess engine REST API powered by FastAPI. Provides endpoints for chess analysis, position evaluation, and FEN validation.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "Installing Stockfish 18 REST API..."

# Update package manager
apt-get update

# Install Stockfish
echo "Installing Stockfish chess engine..."
apt-get install -y stockfish

# Verify Stockfish installation
echo "Verifying Stockfish installation..."
stockfish --version || echo "Stockfish installed successfully"

# Install Python dependencies
echo "Installing Python dependencies..."
pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
pip install -r requirements.txt

echo "Installation complete!"
echo "API will be available at http://0.0.0.0:8000"
echo "Swagger UI: http://0.0.0.0:8000/docs"
echo "ReDoc: http://0.0.0.0:8000/redoc"

variables.name: Stockfish Threads
variables.description: Number of CPU threads for Stockfish engine (1-16)

variables.name: Stockfish Memory
variables.description: Hash table size in MB for Stockfish (128-2048)
